title: Rotten Flesh into Leather
description: This project adds a useful use for Rotten Flesh
body:
# Rotten Flesh into Leather
Simple Plugin/Mod that turns useless rotten flesh into leather.
You can edit in the config.yml how much rotten flesh it takes to craft leather.
If you find bugs report them at [Discord](https://discord.gg/xngPvHKtQR)
